attributes.additional_details:
Multiple studies have been published proving that AI gives people less opportunity to practice essential skills such as problem solving and critical thinking. 
As of 2025–26, 86-92% of students use AI for their studies with 6 in 10 UK schoolchildren feeling that AI has negatively impacted their skills in relation to schoolwork.
In the UK, 33% of student papers were flagged for plagiarism, even though only 10% were primarily AI-generated. 
Not to mention the negative effects on the planet.
attributes.background: Implement a ban or severe restrictions on the use of AI in schools by both students and teachers.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban AI usage in education by teachers and students
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761473
